prompt: Fix division-by-zero handling in the calculator fixture so the function raises a clear ValueError, update the tests, update README.md to document the new behavior, run verification, and include a review-ready summary.
success_criteria: The failing bug is fixed in code
Automated tests were run and passed
The final report mentions review status
README.md documents the changed division-by-zero behavior
must_not: Skip the README.md update after changing divide() behavior
